items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the Welcome Series email.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a confirmation email with specific content as part of the Welcome Series. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or implementation of this email. The linked use case outlines the requirement but lacks the necessary evidence to assert whether it is satisfied or not, leading to an inconclusive result.
